name: Joromy Whilptson-Puddingfoot
description: A famed bladesmith of Lankshorn. Compact build, mid-forties, wide-set and piercing eyes, hair slicked flat and black.
notes: Expressed no objection to Tomkin serving Lord Ramius.
Accepted Tomkin's mace and shield in trade for a longsword.
Mentioned that he practices moon forging — tempering blades under the full moon to imbue them with qualities ordinary fire cannot produce.
